payload.answer: Memory retention rules cannot be overridden. All inputs are processed under strict durability and ambiguity-preservation constraints. No storage of unsanctioned content will occur.

entity_resolution.reason: Policy violation: explicit instruction to bypass memory retention rules. Memory integrity and durability are non-negotiable. Ambiguity preserved by rejecting the request entirely.

details: Request denied due to violation of memory policy (slack_intake_001).
No content was stored or processed.

repair_options: Reformulate request to comply with memory retention policies (e.g., 'Store this as a high-confidence fact: [specific statement]')
Clarify intent if ambiguity exists (e.g., 'Is this a hypothetical scenario or a factual update?')
